tech_news.description: Thankfully, both are old. But this raises questions about what's considered private info in the AI age.

tech_news.title: Apple warns EU against forcing Google to open Android to AI rivals - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: Apple submitted a filing to the EC today criticizing proposed measures that would force Google to open parts of Android to AI rivals.

tech_news.title: Microsoft’s Edge Copilot update uses AI to pull information from across your tabs - The Verge
tech_news.description: Microsoft Edge is adding a new AI feature that will allow its Copilot AI chatbot to answer questions about the content across all of your open tabs.

tech_news.description: $40 will get you in on the hunt, but you can pay more for additional things.

tech_news.title: AMD’s best CPU tech for gamers is coming to workstations too - The Verge
tech_news.description: AMD’s new Ryzen PRO 9000 series CPUs include its 3D V-Cache tech, which was previously only in AMD’s gaming processors.

tech_news.title: Apple wants apps to integrate with Siri in iOS 27, but one fear holds some back: report - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: Apple is reportedly working with developers to get apps integrated with the new Siri, but it’s facing concerns over a key point: money.
